Title: User Registration
Preconditions: User is not registered in the system.
Test Data:
- Username: testuser
- Password: TestPass123!
- Email: test@example.com
- Admin: false
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the registration page.
2. User enters the required details (username, password, email).
3. User clicks the 'Register' button.
4. System validates the input fields.
5. System inserts the user into the database.
Expected Result:
- User is successfully registered.
- Confirmation message is displayed.
- User can now log in using the provided credentials.

Title: User Login
Preconditions: User is registered in the system.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters the correct username and password.
3. User clicks the 'Login' button.
4. System verifies the user's credentials against the database.
5. System grants access to the user.
Expected Result:
- User is logged in successfully.
- User is redirected to the dashboard.

Title: Invalid User Login
Preconditions: User is registered in the system.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters the correct username and incorrect password.
3. User clicks the 'Login' button.
4. System verifies the user's credentials against the database.
5. System denies access to the user.
Expected Result:
- Error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials.
- User remains on the login page.

Title: User Deletion
Preconditions: User is registered in the system.
Test Steps:
1. User logs in.
2. User navigates to the profile settings.
3. User initiates the deletion process.
4. System prompts for confirmation.
5. User confirms the deletion.
6. System deletes the user from the database.
Expected Result:
- User is deleted from the system.
- Confirmation message is displayed.
- User cannot log in again with the same credentials.

Title: Admin User Access All Materials
Preconditions: Admin user is registered in the system.
Test Data:
- Username: adminuser
- Password: AdminPass123!
- Admin: true
Test Steps:
1. Admin user logs in.
2. Admin user navigates to the materials section.
3. System grants access to all materials.
Expected Result: - Admin user can view all materials in the system.

Title: Non-Admin User Access Own Materials
Preconditions: Non-admin user is registered in the system.
Test Data:
- Username: testuser
- Password: TestPass123!
- Admin: false
Test Steps:
1. Non-admin user logs in.
2. Non-admin user navigates to the materials section.
3. System grants access only to the user's own materials.
Expected Result: - Non-admin user can view only their own materials.

Title: Application Adds Itself to Database

Test Steps:

2. Application verifies the user's credentials against the database.
3. Application grants access to the user.
Expected Result:

Title: Application Requests Data from Database
Preconditions: Application is running.
Test Steps:
1. Application requests data from the database.
2. Database processes the request.
3. Database returns the requested data to the application.
Expected Result:
- Data is successfully retrieved from the database.
- Confirmation message is returned to the application.

Title: Application Sends New Data to Database

3. Database updates the data in the database.
Expected Result:
- Data is successfully updated in the database.
- Confirmation message is returned to the application.

Preconditions: Application has updated data in the database.
Test Steps:
1. Application confirms the update.
2. Database processes the confirmation.
3. Database returns the confirmation to the application.
Expected Result:

- Confirmation message is returned to the application.

Title: Execute Device Scan
Preconditions: Main application is running.
Test Steps:
1. Main application executes the device scan.
2. Application executes the hardware scan.
3. Application checks if components are functioning.
4. If components are functioning, application retrieves the impact of component replacement.
5. Application returns the name, impact component, and diagnostic device.
Expected Result:
- Device scan is executed successfully.
- Components are checked for functionality.
- Impact of component replacement is retrieved if components are functioning.
- Results are returned to the main application.

Title: Execute Hardware Scan
Preconditions: Device scan is initiated.
Test Steps:
1. Application executes the hardware scan.
2. Application checks if components are functioning.
3. If components are functioning, application retrieves the impact of component replacement.
4. Application returns the results to the main application.
Expected Result:
- Hardware scan is executed successfully.
- Components are checked for functionality.
- Impact of component replacement is retrieved if components are functioning.
- Results are returned to the main application.

Title: Return Results of Device Scan
Preconditions: Device scan is completed.
Test Steps:
1. Main application receives the results of the device scan.
2. Main application processes the results.
3. Main application displays the results to the user.
Expected Result: - Results of the device scan are processed and displayed correctly.

Title: Calculate Expected Life of Component
Preconditions: Hardware scan is completed.
Test Steps:
1. Application calculates the expected life of the component based on speed and health.
2. Application returns the result to the main application.
Expected Result:
- Expected life of the component is calculated accurately.
- Result is returned to the main application.

Title: Execute Hardware Scan with Defective Components
Preconditions: Device scan is initiated.
Test Steps:
1. Application executes the hardware scan.
2. Application checks if components are functioning.
3. If components are not functioning, application returns the results to the main application.
Expected Result:
- Hardware scan is executed successfully.
- Defective components are identified.
- Results are returned to the main application.

Title: Return Results of Hardware Scan with Defective Components
Preconditions: Hardware scan is completed with defective components.
Test Data: - Hardware scan results with defective components
Test Steps:
1. Main application receives the results of the hardware scan.
2. Main application processes the results.
3. Main application displays the results to the user.
Expected Result:
- Results of the hardware scan are processed and displayed correctly.
- Defective components are highlighted in the results.

Title: Calculate Expected Life of Component with Defective Components
Preconditions: Hardware scan is completed with defective components.
Test Data: - Component speed and health with defective components
Test Steps:
1. Application calculates the expected life of the component based on speed and health.
2. Application returns the result to the main application
